papers.title: FLASH: Fast Linked AF_XDP Sockets for High Performance Network Function Chains
papers.summary: Recent advances in the Linux kernel, such as eXpress Data Path (XDP) and AF_XDP sockets, enable high-speed packet processing for software NFs while preserving access to kernel features. However, the default AF_XDP implem...

papers.title: ChainIO: Bridging Disk and Network Domains with eBPF
papers.summary: Modern data-driven services from analytical databases and key-value stores to stream processors suffer high tail-latencies because each disk read and subsequent packet send/recv incurs a separate user-kernel crossing and...
papers.summary_en: Modern data-driven services from analytical databases and key-value stores to stream processors suffer high tail-latencies because each disk read and ...

papers.title: Are Kernel Drivers Ready For Accelerated Packet Processing Using AF_XDP?
papers.summary: 本文探讨了Linux内核4.18引入的AF_XDP加速包处理技术的内核驱动就绪状态。AF_XDP作为新型内核旁路方案，与DPDK等传统方案不同，它无需特殊执行环境，依赖内核驱动实现高性能。论文通过对比测试评估不同厂商内核驱动对AF_XDP的支持程度和性能表现，关注驱动实现的成熟度和实际部署可行性。研究涉及Linux内核网络栈、零拷贝技术、驱动与用户空间的高效数据传输等核心议题，对理解现代高速网络处理技术具有重要参考价值。
papers.summary_en: AF_XDP is a new technology for accelerated packet processing that was introduced in Linux kernel 4.18. Unlike other kernel bypassing technologies, AF_...

papers.title: An In-Kernel Inline Crypto Solution for eXpress Data Path With QuickAssist Technology: Design, Prototyping and Performance Evaluation
papers.summary: 该论文针对Linux内核XDP（eXpress Data Path）框架无法解析和处理加密数据包的问题，提出了一种基于Intel QuickAssist硬件加速技术的内核内联加密解决方案。XDP作为Linux主线的高性能可编程数据包处理框架，在DDoS防护、路由、负载均衡等场景表现优异，但面对日益增长的加密流量时能力受限。本文设计并原型实现了在XDP层直接进行加解密处理的方案，既保持了XDP的高性能优势，又扩展了其处理加密数据的能力，并进行了详尽的性能评估验证。
papers.summary_en: The eXpress Data Path (XDP) has been part of mainline Linux kernel as an approach of high-performance programmable packet processing. It has demonstra...

papers.title: Understanding Delays in AF_XDP-based Applications
papers.summary: 本文研究AF_XDP应用中延迟问题的根源。AF_XDP是一种Linux内核提供的高性能数据包处理机制，允许应用直接在网络驱动层接收数据包，绕过传统复杂网络栈。内容涉及XDP（eXpress Data Path）与DPDK两种主流内核旁路方案的性能对比，探讨AF_XDP在生产环境中的延迟表现及优化方向。该研究对理解Linux内核网络性能优化、eBPF/XDP技术实践具有重要参考价值，属于Linux内核网络子系统的核心热点领域。
papers.summary_en: Packet processing on Linux can be slow due to its complex network stack. To solve this problem, there are two main solutions: eXpress Data Path (XDP) ...

papers.title: SRA: Leveraging AF_XDP for Programmable Network Functions with IPv6 Segment Routing
papers.summary: The IPv6 Segment Routing (SRv6) is a promising solution to support services such as service function chain (SFC) and network function virtualization (NFV). But the SRv6 implementation in the Linux kernel is being critici...

papers.title: 100-Gbit/s UDP Data Acquisition on Linux Using AF_XDP: The TRISTAN Detector
papers.summary: 本文介绍在Linux系统上使用AF_XDP实现100-Gbit/s高速UDP数据采集的方案，用于TRISTAN粒子探测器。AF_XDP是Linux内核网络栈中的重要技术，允许绕过传统网络路径实现高速数据包处理，直接将数据传递到用户空间。文章展示了在核物理实验场景下如何通过AF_XDP技术突破传统POSIX socket的性能瓶颈，实现亚微秒级延迟的超高速数据采集。
papers.summary_en: A growing number of detectors produce data rates of more than 100 Gb/s, which often necessitate software-defined data processing to operate. Because o...

papers.title: Startup Delay Performance Evaluation for SOME/IP: A Comparative Analysis on Linux Network API
papers.summary: 本文研究软件定义车辆中车内通信的早期可用性问题，重点比较了两种Linux底层网络API（Raw Socket和PCAP）对SOME/IP服务启动延迟的影响。实验在NXP S32G嵌入式Linux平台上进行，结果显示Raw Socket始终实现最小延迟（13-15 ms），而PCAP延迟更长。论文直接涉及Linux网络编程接口的性能对比，但主要服务于汽车以太网场景下的SOME/IP中间件优化，而非通用内核网络子系统的深度研究。内容偏重嵌入式平台性能测试与汽车软件架构，对内核网络协议栈本身的研究有限。
papers.summary_en: In software-defined vehicles, early availability of in-vehicle communication is critical. This paper investigates how two low-level networking methods...

news.title: LWN.net Weekly Edition for April 23, 2026
news.abstract: LWN.net Weekly Edition for April 23, 2026 [LWN.net] LWN .net News from the source Content Weekly Edition Archives Search Kernel Security Events calendar Unread comments LWN FAQ Write for us Edition ⇒Front page Brief items Announcements One big page Previous week Following week Download EPUB User: P
news.summary: 这是2026年4月23日的LWN.net周刊摘要，包含多个技术话题的预告。文章提到7.1内核合并窗口的第一部分内容即将发布，但未提供具体的网络开发细节。周刊还包括使用LLM发现Python C扩展bug、7.0调度器回归问题、Rust Sized trait层次结构提案、供应链攻击防御讨论等话题。本期内容仅为周刊目录介绍，缺少Linux内核网络相关的具体技术细节。
